hooks.command: d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != / ]; do [ -f "$d/gosymdb.sqlite" ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: gosymdb is indexed for this codebase. Use gosymdb commands instead of grep for symbol navigation. Run: gosymdb find --q <query> --json, or use /gosymdb:sym, /gosymdb:trace, /gosymdb:impact skills. Grep is only appropriate for non-symbol searches (string literals, TODOs, config values)."}}' && exit 0; d=$(dirname "$d"); done
